summary: Full E2E testing of Patent Filing app completed. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed (auth, topics, applications CRUD, tracking, stats, admin status update, logout). Frontend: Landing page, Apply flow (creates PAT-E9500AA8), Track flow, Admin login, Admin dashboard (stats show 3 total applications), Admin applications list with search, Status update dialog, and Logout all work correctly. Protected routes properly redirect to /admin/login when unauthenticated. HttpOnly cookies are set on login and cleared on logout (verified /auth/me returns 401 after logout).
critical_code_review_comments: CORS is configured with a single origin from FRONTEND_URL env (good). allow_credentials=True with explicit origin is correct.
Brute force lockout implemented (5 attempts, 15 min window) - good security practice.
bcrypt password hashing with proper $2b$ format verified via seed_admin.
HttpOnly cookies set with samesite=lax, secure=False for dev. Should be secure=True in production.
seed_admin is idempotent - updates password if changed (good).
MongoDB ObjectId excluded from responses via {"_id": 0} projection - good.
Minor: login_attempts cleanup could use TTL index for auto-expiration instead of manual cleanup on success.
Minor: Application creation endpoint has no rate limiting; could be abused.
Minor: Email format not validated via Pydantic EmailStr - uses plain str.
seed_data_creation: Created test applications via API: PAT-E9500AA8 (TEST_UI_Student from UI flow), and several TEST_ prefixed records from pytest runs. Pre-existing PAT-B1739DFC also verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest). All 17 tests pass. Frontend uses data-testid attributes extensively - refer to pages/*.js for selectors. Admin seed runs on startup via seed_admin(). Tracking IDs follow format PAT-XXXXXXXX. Valid status values: submitted, under_review, in_progress, abstract_needed, filing, filed, acknowledged, granted.
